projectDescription: A cross-platform desktop application built with Tauri and React that downloads and converts video and audio from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and other platforms into common formats (MP4, WebM, MP3, WAV, FLAC, M4A, OGG) with zero manual tool setup.
keyFeatures: Download video and audio from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and other yt-dlp-supported platforms
Convert to MP4, WebM, MP3, WAV, FLAC, M4A, or OGG
Audio bitrate selection: High (320 kbps), Medium (160 kbps), Low (96 kbps)
Real-time download queue with progress, speed, and ETA indicators
Automatic first-run download of yt-dlp and ffmpeg — zero manual setup
Automatic clipboard URL detection on focus
Native desktop UI built with Tauri v2 and React 18
publicApiSurface: start_download(id, url, format, quality, output_dir) -> Result<(), String>
OutputFormat type: mp4 | webm | mp3 | wav | flac | m4a | ogg
Quality type: best | 1080p | 720p | 480p | high | medium | low
DownloadStatus type: queued | fetching-info | downloading | converting | done | error | cancelled
